Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8089/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_python_code","arguments":{"code":"import unreal\\nbp = unreal.load_asset\(\\"/Game/Tests/BP_DelegateTest\\"\)\\nfor graph in bp.function_graphs + bp.event_graphs:\\n    for node in graph.nodes:\\n        title = node.get_node_title\(unreal.NodeTitleType.FULL_TITLE\)\\n        print\(f\\"{graph.get_name\(\)} | {node.__class__.__name__} | {title}\\"\)\\n"}}}')

  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":12,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"execute_python_code","arguments":{"code":"import unreal\\nfrom unreal import BlueprintService\\n\\n# Use get_node_info since we have the GUID\\nbp_path = \\"/Game/Tests/BP_DelegateTest\\"\\nguid = \\"1B17F026432F48DCD5CA9391FA5711EE\\"\\nresult = BlueprintService.get_node_info\(bp_path, \\"EventGraph\\", guid\)\\nprint\(result\)\\n"}}}')
